Home / Service Areas / West Palm Beach

General contractor in West Palm Beach, FL

Trusted local professionals serving West Palm Beach and surrounding communities

Serving West Palm Beach, FL

Veloz Contractors is pleased to offer its general contractor expertise to West Palm Beach, Florida. With its rich history and diverse architecture, including many homes from the 1920s to 1950s, West Palm Beach presents unique renovation and restoration opportunities. Our team has a passion for preserving the character of these historic homes while incorporating modern amenities and functionality. We are committed to providing exceptional service and quality workmanship.

We are experienced in navigating the historic preservation guidelines and regulations in West Palm Beach. The year-round heat and humidity can take a toll on older homes, so we utilize specialized techniques and materials to ensure their long-term health and beauty.
